title: Resolve, Regarding Legislative Review Of Portions Of Chapter 6:  Standards Relating To Prescriptive Authorities And Collaborative Relationship For Naturopathic Doctors, A Late-Filed Major Substantive Rule Of The Department Of Professional And Financial Regulation
subject: AUTHORITIES AND COLLABORATIONS
HEALTH CARE SERVICES
PRESCRIPTION DRUGS

actions.description: Representative MATHIESON for the Department of Professional and Financial Regulation pursuant to the Maine Revised Statutes, Title 5, section 8072 and approved for introduction by a majority of the Legislative Council, reports that the Resolve be REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 218.
The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 218.
Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Report READ and ACCEPTED, in concurrence.
On motion by Senator Bailey of York REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 218, in concurrence.
